[Congressional Bills 104th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 34 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                In the House of Representatives, U. S.,

                                                      January 11, 1995.
    Resolved, That the following named Members be, and they are hereby, elected 
to the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on Rules: John Joseph Moakley, Massachusetts, Ranking Minority 
Member; Anthony C. Beilenson, California; Martin Frost, Texas; and Tony P. Hall, 
Ohio.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
